children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: A petition for a certification of eligibility to apply for adjustment assistance under this part may be filed with the Secretary by a group of agricultural commodity producers or by their duly authorized representative. Upon receipt of the petition, the Secretary shall promptly publish notice in the Federal Register that the Secretary has received the petition and initiated an investigation.

children.heading: Hearings
children.label: b Hearings
children.text: If the petitioner, or any other person found by the Secretary to have a substantial interest in the proceedings, submits not later than 10 days after the date of the Secretary’s publication under subsection (a) of this section a request for a hearing, the Secretary shall provide for a public hearing and afford such interested person an opportunity to be present, to produce evidence, and to be heard.

that the national average price for the agricultural commodity, or a class of goods within the agricultural commodity, produced by the group for the most recent marketing year for which the national average price is available is less than 80 percent of the average of the national average price for such agricultural commodity, or such class of goods, for the 5 marketing years preceding the most recent marketing year; and

that increases in imports of articles like or directly competitive with the agricultural commodity, or class of goods within the agricultural commodity, produced by the group contributed importantly to the decline in price described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: Special rule for qualified subsequent years
children.label: d Special rule for qualified subsequent years

children.text: the national average price for the agricultural commodity, or class of goods within the agricultural commodity, produced by the group for the most recent marketing year for which the national average price is available is equal to or less than the price determined under subsection (c)(1); and
the requirements of subsection (c)(2) are met.

children.heading: Determination of qualified year and commodity
children.label: e Determination of qualified year and commodity

children.heading: Qualified year
children.label: 1 Qualified year
children.text: The term “qualified year”, with respect to a group of agricultural commodity producers certified as eligible under , means each consecutive year after the year in which the group is certified and in which the Secretary makes the determination under subsection (c) or (d), as the case may be.section 2401b of this title

children.heading: Classes of goods within a commodity
children.label: 2 Classes of goods within a commodity
children.text: In any case in which there are separate classes of goods within an agricultural commodity, the Secretary shall treat each class as a separate commodity in determining group eligibility, the national average price, and level of imports under this section and .section 2401e of this title
